name: Neal Franklin

contactInfo.office: 100 N. Broadway Ave., Suite 300, Tyler, TX 75702

bio: Neal Franklin serves as the Smith County Judge, the chief executive and administrative officer of Smith County. The county judge presides over the Commissioners Court and oversees county government operations including budgeting, emergency management, and infrastructure.
campaignPromises: Keep Smith County taxes low while maintaining services
Support law enforcement and public safety
